title: Open Lofting Cliff: repair handoff prepared, curation remains partial
body: Owner redirected to a single-agent handoff brief. Repair state: failed 2026-05-31 archive sidecars removed, active napkin and distilled restored as counted buffers, strict-hard truth still critical or hard. Small real distilled batch landed with item-level dispositions into pending-graduations and existing durable docs. Original consolidation is not complete.
